task1.title: The aid from six developed countries to developing countries from 2008-2010
task1.instruction: The chart below shows the aid from six developed countries to developing countries from 2008-2010. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: Some people say it is government’s responsibility to transport children to school, while others believe parents should transport their children to school. Discuss both views and give your opinion.
